reviews.review_description: Pls new update and pls more people online

developer_response.body:
hey there! thanks for your review! sadly we no longer work on MokiBlox :(
However we are planning to start up a new VR title for you to enjoy.
We thank you for enjoying our game while it lasted!

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed ,my time in this game, i was fortunate enough to meet the mods who were really fun and nice and got to enjoy the creative building mechanics the game had to offer, 100% recomend the game to any person who enjoys the gorilla tag fan games and building games, thanks

no other game had me bouncing like this one(pause)
